# www.yuzool.com llms.txt

> Centralized platform for creators and freelancers to build, launch, and monetize digital offers efficiently within a single workspace.

- [Creator Studio](https://www.yuzool.com/creative-dashboard.html): Offers an all-in-one creator workspace for building, launching, and monetizing digital products.
- [Yuzool Commerce Plugin Landing](https://www.yuzool.com/commerce/): WordPress commerce plugin page covering 60-second setup, demo flow, comparison, and install CTA.
- [Delisted](https://www.yuzool.com/delisted/): Curated one-of-one app and project transfers for founders who want to buy a project and start a business faster.
- [Bio.at Link-In-Bio Builder](https://www.yuzool.com/link-bio.html): Build, edit, and share creator bio pages with URL-state sharing and QR output.
- [Cloak for Mac](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/cloak.html): Private local AI app for Mac with on-device models, optional Apple Intelligence workflows, and one-time Stripe checkout.
- [Suzume for Mac](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/suzume.html): Sparrow-inspired text-first Mac mail app launching in June 2026 with early adopter supporter pricing.
- [Drip Send Product Page](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend.html): Privacy-first personal outreach app for Mac with local control and safer pacing.
- [Drip Send Guides Hub](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/): Central index for Drip Send outreach, deliverability, and setup guides.
- [Guide: Privacy-First Outreach on Mac](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/email-outreach-marketing-privacy-mac.html): Email outreach and marketing workflow focused on local privacy and sender control.
- [Guide: SPF DKIM DMARC Deliverability](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/email-deliverability-spf-dkim-dmarc-guide.html): Practical email authentication and inbox placement checklist.
- [Guide: How to Set Up Drip Send](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/how-to-setup-and-use-drip-send.html): Step-by-step onboarding guide from SMTP setup to first outreach queue.
- [Guide: Sending Limits on Your SMTP Server](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/sending-through-your-email-server-with-delivery-limits.html): Delivery limit and pacing strategy for safer outbound.
- [Guide: Personal Outreach with Gmail](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/personal-outreach-emails-using-gmail.html): Gmail SMTP setup and quality-first sending tips.
- [Guide: Follow-up Cadence](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/follow-up-cadence-for-personal-outreach.html): Personal outreach sequence timing and follow-up best practices.
- [Guide: List Hygiene and Suppression](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/outreach-list-hygiene-and-suppression-guide.html): Contact cleaning and suppression workflows to protect deliverability.
- [Guide: Outreach Templates That Get Replies](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/personal-email-outreach-templates-that-get-replies.html): Reusable email frameworks for human outreach copy.
- [Guide: Best SMTP Providers for Personal Outreach](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/best-smtp-providers-for-personal-outreach.html): Comparison of SES, Mailgun, SendGrid, Postmark, and Gmail SMTP tradeoffs.
- [Guide: Warm Up a New Email Domain](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/how-to-warm-up-a-new-email-domain-for-outreach.html): Domain warmup pacing plan for safer outreach scaling.
- [Guide: Avoid Spam Filters in Personal Outreach](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/how-to-avoid-spam-filters-in-personal-outreach.html): Inbox placement checklist for copy, list quality, and sending behavior.
- [Guide: Improve Reply Rates with Personalization and Timing](https://www.yuzool.com/apps/dripsend/improve-email-reply-rates-with-personalization-and-timing.html): Response-rate optimization tactics for personal email campaigns.
- [Compare: Drip Send vs Sendy](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/dripsend-vs-sendy/): Personal outreach queue workflow versus self-hosted newsletter-style sending.
- [Compare: Drip Send vs Mailbutler](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/dripsend-vs-mailbutler/): Dedicated outreach queue app versus inbox productivity extension.
- [Compare: Drip Send vs Mailchimp](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/dripsend-vs-mailchimp/): Personal one-by-one outreach versus marketing automation suite.
- [Compare: Drip Send vs SerialMailer 8](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/dripsend-vs-serialmailer8/): Careful personal outreach workflow versus list-based Mac bulk sender tooling.
- [Compare: Drip Send vs MaxBulk Mailer](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/dripsend-vs-maxbulkmailer/): Outreach quality and queue controls versus classic bulk-mailing software.
- [Widget Templates Index](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/index.html): Browse all 10 responsive demo templates with preview and Pro download actions.
- [Template Generator](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-generator.html): Build custom page templates by toggling sections and widget blocks, then export portable HTML.
- [Template: Agency Proof](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-agency-proof.html): Dark testimonial-focused agency landing template demo.
- [Template: CSV Data](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-csv-data.html): Data table and CSV-heavy business template demo.
- [Template: Events Calendar](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-events-calendar.html): Community calendar and announcement template demo.
- [Template: RSS Feed Site](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-rss-feed-site.html): Publisher-style feed-driven blog template demo.
- [Template: Simple Business B2B](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-simple-business-b2b.html): Local business conversion template demo.
- [Template: SaaS ConvertFlow](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-saas-convertflow.html): SaaS launch template with live pricing and FAQ examples.
- [Template: Studio Portfolio Grid](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-studio-portfolio-grid.html): Portfolio template with social-proof and before/after examples.
- [Template: Cafe Local Promo](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-cafe-local-promo.html): Local hospitality template with booking-style sections.
- [Template: Ecommerce Product Launch](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-ecommerce-product-launch.html): Product launch template with urgency and comparison sections.
- [Template: Agency Demand Engine](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/templates/template-agency-demand-engine.html): B2B agency demand-gen template with lead-capture sections.
- [Guide: Event Calendar Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/event-calendar-widget.html): Deploy upcoming event calendars and booking-ready event lists without plugin lock-in.
- [Guide: CSV to HTML Table](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/csv-to-html-table.html): Convert CSV datasets into portable HTML table blocks for any website builder.
- [Guide: RSS Feed Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/rss-feed-widget.html): Lightweight RSS/Atom feed embed guide with copy-paste output patterns.
- [Guide: Google Reviews Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/google-reviews-widget.html): Social-proof review block guide with fast, portable embed output.
- [Guide: CSV Table Generator](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/csv-table-generator.html): Quick CSV-to-table embed guide for practical data publishing.
- [Guide: Testimonial Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/testimonial-widget.html): Testimonial embed guide for landing pages and sales proof sections.
- [Guide Alias](https://www.yuzool.com/guide/index.html): Redirect alias for the main guides index.
- [Compare: Bio.at vs Linko.me](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/bio-at-vs-linko-me/): Practical comparison page for link-in-bio workflow fit.
- [Compare: Bio.at vs Linktree](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/bio-at-vs-linktree/): Hosted link-in-bio convenience vs ownership-first control.
- [Compare: Bio.at vs Beacons](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/bio-at-vs-beacons/): Creator suite convenience vs portable bio page output.
- [Compare: Bio.at vs Stan](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/bio-at-vs-stan/): Storefront-first workflow vs purpose-built link-in-bio builder.
- [Compare: Bio.at vs Carrd](https://www.yuzool.com/compare/bio-at-vs-carrd/): General one-page builder vs dedicated creator bio workflow.
- [Intent Catalog JSON](https://www.yuzool.com/ai/intents.json): Machine-readable catalog of dashboard intents with categories, app routes, pro boundaries, and upgrade metadata.

- [Yuzool API + Agents](https://www.yuzool.com/api/): Marketing and integration entry point for agent-native Yuzool APIs and MCP tools.
- [Agent Skills Hub](https://www.yuzool.com/agent-skills): Copy-paste prompts, endpoint examples, and live API runner for agents.
- [Agent Keys](https://www.yuzool.com/agent-keys): Self-serve key creation and billing-gated agent access settings.
- [Agent Ops](https://www.yuzool.com/agent-ops): Internal monitoring dashboard for jobs, webhooks, queue sweep, and audit events.
- [Agent API Docs](https://www.yuzool.com/docs/agent-api.md): Full endpoint reference including 10-line bootstrap for autonomous agents.
- [Agent Quickstart TXT](https://www.yuzool.com/api/quickstart.txt): Plain-text bootstrap block for rapid system prompt setup.
- [Agent Examples JSON](https://www.yuzool.com/api/examples.json): Canonical request examples for intent routing, invoice draft flow, and widget revise patches.

## Agent Tooling Layer
- [Agent Registry JSON](https://www.yuzool.com/agents.json): Master tool discovery surface for agents.
- [Generator Index JSON](https://www.yuzool.com/generators/index.json): Canonical list of public generator endpoints.
- [Intent Map JSON](https://www.yuzool.com/intent-map.json): Intent phrase routing map to generator UI paths.
- [LLM Docs Index](https://www.yuzool.com/docs/llm/index.md): Human + agent docs for each canonical generator.
- [LLM Doc: App Store Screenshot Generator](https://www.yuzool.com/docs/llm/app-store-screenshot.md): Params, intents, outputs, and prefill examples.

- [Stamp Builder](https://www.yuzool.com/stamp/builder.html): Template-based graphic editor with live preview, brand kit support, and export actions.
- [Stamp Template Builder](https://www.yuzool.com/stamp/template-builder.html): Build and edit custom Stamp template JSON with layer controls and synced preview.
- [Stamp Brand Kits](https://www.yuzool.com/stamp/brand-kits.html): Save and manage brand logos, color tokens, and font stacks for consistent outputs.
- [Stamp Batch Jobs](https://www.yuzool.com/stamp/batch-jobs.html): Generate multiple graphics from CSV or JSON rows using template-driven batch runs.
- [Stamp Share Preview](https://www.yuzool.com/stamp/share.html): Open and share template state previews from Stamp in a lightweight view page.
- [Stamp Tool Guide](https://www.yuzool.com/tools/stamp.html): Practical guide with live preview, feature map, use cases, and direct links to Stamp workflows.
- [Widget Studio](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/): Build and preview embeddable widgets, then unlock Pro for copy/embed/download outputs.
- [Widget Studio Index](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/index.html): Direct app route for browsing, previewing, and configuring the full widget catalog.
- [Team Timezone Nexus Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/?widget=team-timezone-nexus): Nexus-style global timezone board for distributed teams with live local clocks and overlap context.
- [Focus Break Stopwatch Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/?widget=focus-break-stopwatch-braun): Braun-inspired focus/break interval timer with start, pause, mode switch, and reset.
- [Kanban Task Flow Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/?widget=kanban-task-flow-share): Shareable kanban board with drag-and-drop task movement, URL state export/import, and local autosave.
- [Apps Embed Hub Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/?widget=apps-embed-hub): Multi-app embed container for one-page app templates with grid/stack/tabs layouts and optional external app URLs.
- [Google Reviews (No API) Widget](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/?widget=google-reviews-no-api): Google-style review wall, carousel, slider, and rating badge widget with easy CSV/TSV/JSON import and Google review CTAs.

- [PageMint Builder](https://www.yuzool.com/widgets/pagemint/builder.html): Structured site generator with guided sections, live preview, and shareable project flow.

- [Google Reviews Import Helper](https://www.yuzool.com/tools/google-reviews-importer.html): Prepare and copy Google review data in CSV or JSON for the Google Reviews (No API) widget importer.
- [PageMint Tool Guide](https://www.yuzool.com/tools/pagemint.html): Overview of the PageMint workflow, section controls, and launch-ready usage patterns.
- [Widget Studio Deployment Guide](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/widget-studio.html): Detailed workflow guide for deploying Widget Studio templates and pairing them with Stamp campaigns.
- [Widgets Embed Quickstart](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/widgets-embed-quickstart.html): Fast setup checklist for embedding widgets in major builders and static HTML pages.
- [PageMint Quickstart Guide](https://www.yuzool.com/guides/pagemint-quickstart.html): Practical launch checklist for generating structured pages with PageMint.
